biological_replicate: we processed five patient samples using SEC.
technical_replicate: the number of MUC16 peptides identified and percent coverage between two biological replicates.
experimental_design: SEC enrichment vs Top 14 protein depletion
SEC enrichment of MUC16 from serum enables mass spectrometry detection.
factor_value: CA125 concentration (5000 U mL−1, 100 U mL−1)
spiked with clinically relevant amounts of CA125 (5000 U mL−1 and 100 U mL−1).
